---
name: Documentation claim-boundary issue
about: A doc/receipt/demo appears to overclaim past the frozen boundaries
title: "[claim] <one-line>"
labels: claim-boundary
---

**Where** (file + line / command output): ...

**Apparent overclaim**: quote the text that seems to assert one of the forbidden
claims from [`docs/CLAIM_BOUNDARIES.md`](../../docs/CLAIM_BOUNDARIES.md):

- [ ] hardware proof
- [ ] live-seller proof
- [ ] business-outcome proof
- [ ] universal real-app compatibility
- [ ] parser generalizes to all merchant Thai

**Correct framing**: what the artifact is actually allowed to say.

Overclaiming is treated as a bug here — the frozen categories staying frozen is
the whole credibility of the kernel.
